parameters.description: The unique device ID which identifies each 1NCE SIM. Can be obtained from the Get All Devices API query. For 1NCE SIMS the device ID is equal to its iccid.
parameters.name: deviceId

parameters.description: ICCID of a SIM device, used to identifiy each 1NCE SIM.
parameters.name: iccid

parameters.description: Timestamp from where onwards the historic data messages should be queried.
parameters.name: startDateTime

parameters.description: Timestamp until when the historic data messages should be queried.
parameters.name: endDateTime

parameters.description:
Filter out data for specific protocols:
  • LWM2M
  • UDP
  • COAP
parameters.name: protocol

parameters.description: The interval for which grouping of statistics should occur.
parameters.name: interval
